headline: Here’s Why United Parcel Service Inc. (UPS) is a Top Dividend Stock to Invest in, According to Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies
summary: United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is one of the best dividend stocks to invest in, according to Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies, with a 5.93% yield. On July 6, Morgan Stanley reiterated an Underweight rating on United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE:UPS) and raised the price target to $76 from $75. The research firm raised its price […]

headline: GXO Logistics (GXO) Surges 5.3%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: GXO Logistics (GXO) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.
